AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

URL: https://github.com/CodebuffAI/codebuff

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
Language: typescript
Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
Language: typescript
TencentDB Agent Memory delivers fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive pipeline, with zero external API dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/page-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent
Language: typescript
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anomalyco/opencode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode
Language: typescript
The open source coding agent.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: colbymchenry/codegraph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph
Language: typescript
Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

ns0:entry.ns0:title: directus/directus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/directus/directus
Language: typescript
The flexible backend for all your projects 🐰 Turn your DB into a headless CMS, admin panels, or apps with a custom UI, instant APIs, auth & more.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
Language: typescript
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-labs-code/design.md
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-labs-code/design.md
Language: typescript
A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lightdash/lightdash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lightdash/lightdash
Language: typescript
Agentic BI. Analytics at the speed of code ⚡️

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/logto-io/logto
Language: typescript
🧑‍🚀 Authentication and authorization infrastructure for SaaS and AI apps, built on OIDC and OAuth 2.1 with multi-tenancy, SSO, and RBAC.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: makeplane/plane
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/makeplane/plane
Language: typescript
🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mauriceboe/TREK
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mauriceboe/TREK
Language: typescript
A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: storybookjs/storybook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook
Language: typescript
Storybook is the industry standard workshop for building, documenting, and testing UI components in isolation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: strapi/strapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/strapi/strapi
Language: typescript
🚀 Strapi is the leading open-source headless CMS. It’s 100% JavaScript/TypeScript, fully customizable, and developer-first.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
Language: typescript
OpenAI-compatible proxy that stacks the free tiers of 16 LLM providers (~1.7B tokens/month) behind one /v1 endpoint — plus any custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Smart routing, automatic failover, encrypted keys. Personal experimentation only.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wasp-lang/wasp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wasp-lang/wasp
Language: typescript
The batteries-included full-stack framework for the AI era. Develop JS/TS web apps (React, Node.js, and Prisma) using declarative code that abstracts away complex full-stack features like auth, background jobs, RPC, email sending, end-to-end type safety, single-command deployment, and more.
